name: 真相大白（分手的真正原因）
name_en: Truth Revealed (the real reason for the breakup)
description: 觀眾和男主一起逐步理解——九年前的分手不是因為她在玩弄感情，而是被養父強迫回到牢籠。所有的'壞女人'形象全部反轉，觀眾的情緒從氣憤轉為心疼。

examples.drama_title: 【王奕然💕谭盐盐】九年後再重逢，她以自己為餌展開復仇，京圈太子爺明知是局卻甘願淪陷！ #甜宠  #drama  #复仇
examples.excerpt: You've never once said you like me. / I don't like you. / Cut the crap. If you don't like me, why are you with me? / Because as long as I'm with you, you won't rank first. → 真相：If you fall from first place, a beating will be the least of your worries.
